Mokofa is a type of plant that is native to the Andean region, often used as a medicinal herb. The plant Mokofa has been reported to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Mokofa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The most common herbal preparations made with Mokofa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
